---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug, crash, or unexpected behavior in the mod.
title: "[BUG] Brief description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is and what actually happened.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Launch Minecraft with the mod installed.
2. Do action '...'
3. Interact with item/block '...'
4. See error/crash.

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead.

## Environment Details
* Minecraft Version: [e.g., 1.21.1]
* Mod Loader & Version: [e.g., Fabric 0.15.11, NeoForge 21.1.1]
* Mod Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
* Other Installed Mods: [e.g., OptiFine, JEI, or paste link to modlist]

## Logs and Screenshots
* Crash Log / Game Log: [Paste link to Pastebin/mclogs, or drag-and-drop file here]
* Screenshots/Videos: [Drag and drop images here to help explain your problem]
